requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting into Malta must be aligned to EU-wide harmonised frameworks and then to REWS connection expectations and Enemalta network-operator technical conditions. EU-level references include EN 50549-1/EN 50549-2, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (RfG), and related MV/LV connection rules in the EU. Maltese projects typically use 230/400 V 50 Hz low-voltage interfaces for many utility-scale and behind-the-meter installations, so PCS and protection settings must be set for EU frequency and island-network performance. Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability is the baseline for charging interfaces in many EV-coupled BESS support sites.
summary.zh: 马耳他并网的储能变流器（PCS）需同时满足欧盟协调框架及 REWS 并网接口要求和 Enemalta 电网运营端技术条件。欧盟层面主要参考 EN 50549-1/EN 50549-2、欧盟法規（EU）2016/631（发电机要求）。马耳他项目中大量应用230/400 V、50 Hz的低压接口（含站内配套场景），因此PCS与保护整定需按欧盟频率和离网/并网性能设置。Type 2 / CCS2 是许多EV耦合BESS支撑应用中的标准互操作接口。
summary.zht: 馬耳他並網的儲能變流器（PCS）需同時符合歐盟協調框架及 REWS 並網介面要求和 Enemalta 電網營運端技術條件。歐盟層面主要參考 EN 50549-1/EN 50549-2、歐盟法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求）。馬耳他項目中大量應用230/400 V、50 Hz的低壓介面（含站內配套場景），因此PCS與保護整定需按歐盟頻率與島嶼電網性能設置。Type 2 / CCS2 是許多 EV 耦合BESS支援應用中的標準互操作介面。

standards_or_laws: EN 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 interface standards for EV charging integration contexts

summary.en: In China, GB/T 34120-2023 is the primary technical standard for PCS behavior in connected energy storage projects. Chinese requirements define AC output limits, fault ride-through behavior, communication, and protection. For EU-bound projects, these documents remain a useful engineering baseline but do not directly replace Malta/EU grid interconnection compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器主要依据GB/T 34120-2023，涵盖输出范围、故障穿越、通信与保护要求。该标准对工程设计有技术参考价值，但对于马耳他/欧盟并网而言并不能直接替代并网批准所需证据。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器主要依據GB/T 34120-2023，涵蓋輸出範圍、故障穿越、通信與保護要求。該標準對工程設計有技術參考價值，但對於馬耳他／歐盟並網而言不能直接替代並網核准所需證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System
GB/T 36558-2023 — General Technical Requirements for Electric Energy Storage Systems connected to Power Systems

gap.en: GB/T 34120 is not treated as an equivalent basis for Malta/EU grid permission documents. Export PCS units generally require re-testing and documentation mapping against EN 50549-1/2 and Maltese connection file expectations. Differences typically appear in fault-ride-through curves, reactive capability curves, anti-islanding delay settings, and communication interfaces.
gap.zh: GB/T 34120不能直接替代马耳他/欧盟并网许可文件依据。中国出口PCS通常需要按EN 50549-1/2和马耳他连接文件要求重新测试与映射。差异通常出现在故障穿越曲线、无功能力曲线、孤岛保护延迟和通信接口要求。
gap.zht: GB/T 34120不能直接替代馬耳他／歐盟併網許可文件依據。中國出口PCS通常需要按EN 50549-1/2及馬耳他連接文件要求重新測試與映射。差異通常出現在故障穿越曲線、無功能力曲線、孤島保護延遲和通信接口要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/2 aligned technical compliance and REWS/Enemalta-interpretable grid documentation are required for grid access. RfG is directly applicable EU law in the member-state context.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) within China’s framework; mandatory where grid connection is granted only through project-specific review with grid operators.

source.publisher: Regulator for Energy and Water Services (REWS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS designs that rely only on GB/T 34120 certification are usually insufficient for Malta interconnection. Typical EU entry requires technical file alignment to EN 50549-1/2 plus REWS/Enemalta grid operator review before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅基于GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器通常不足以满足马耳他并网条件。通常情况下，马耳他接入前需按EN 50549-1/2完成技术文件并通过REWS/Enemalta审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅基於GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器通常不足以滿足馬耳他併網條件。通常情況下，馬耳他接入前需按EN 50549-1/2完成技術文件並通過REWS/Enemalta審查。
